description: TSLA default baseline with 60d plus12/minus6 drop-neutral label
keep-all binary stayed nearly identical to the TSLA baseline
60d plus10/minus5 improved validation f1 but weakened test balance
60d plus15/minus8 became the best TSLA label to carry into feature testing
40d plus12/minus6 slightly improved balance but remained too weak overall
ret_60 modestly improved TSLA on the 15/-8 label but still stayed near all-positive
sma_gap_60 improved little on the TSLA 15/-8 label
atr_pct_20 did not materially change the TSLA 15/-8 baseline behavior
distance_to_252_high was the first TSLA feature that broke the near-all-positive pattern
ret_60 plus distance_to_252_high stayed strong but did not beat the best combo
sma_gap_60 plus distance_to_252_high improved balance but weakened test f1
ret_60 plus sma_gap_60 plus distance_to_252_high is the adopted TSLA line after passing the gate and producing a sane live no-entry reading
neg_weight 1.10 on distance_to_252_high improved little and still trailed the 3-feature combo
